---
title: "Week 12"
subtitle: "Varieties of Capitalism"
editor: visual
---

## Readings

📖 Hall and Soskice, [*Varieties of Capitalism*](https://academic.oup.com/book/301/chapter/134893294), Chapter 1

📖 Alesina and Summers, [Central Bank Independence and Macroeconomic Performance](https://www.jstor.org/stable/2077833)

## Slides

🖥️ [Varieties of capitalism](/slides/lecture-11.2.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
